title: Monday and EZLynx Integration
excerpt: While the integration of Monday and EZ exists on Zapier. We cannot fully maximize the use of the integration. Create and Update is the only option we can do in Monday/EZ integration, and deleting information from monday …

posts.author: kirstenx (Kirsten)
posts.cookedHtml: While the integration of Monday and EZ exists on Zapier. We cannot fully maximize the use of the integration. Create and Update is the only option we can do in Monday/EZ integration, and deleting information from monday will not be reflected on ez. We can the delete function to work, so we don’t want to manually delete the information from Ez.
